Variables.Name: StrengthMultiplyer
Variables.Description: Multiplies the strength of any active motors. (can blend from 0-1 for example)

Functions.Name: SetSkeletalMeshComponent
Functions.Description: Sets the skeletal mesh we are driving through physical animation. Will erase any existing physical animation data.

Functions.Name: ApplyPhysicalAnimationSettings
Functions.Description: Applies the physical animation settings to the body given.

Functions.Name: ApplyPhysicalAnimationSettingsBelow
Functions.Description: Applies the physical animation settings to the body given and all bodies below.

Functions.Name: SetStrengthMultiplyer
Functions.Description: Updates strength multiplyer and any active motors

Functions.Name: ApplyPhysicalAnimationProfileBelow
Functions.Description: Applies the physical animation profile to the body given and all bodies below.

Params.Name: BodyName
Params.Description: The body from which we'd like to start applying the physical animation profile. Finds all bodies below in the skeleton hierarchy. None implies all bodies

Params.Name: ProfileName
Params.Description: The physical animation profile we'd like to apply. For each body in the physics asset we search for physical animation settings with this name.

Params.Name: bIncludeSelf
Params.Description: Whether to include the provided body name in the list of bodies we act on (useful to ignore for cases where a root has multiple children)

Params.Name: bClearNotFound
Params.Description: If true, bodies without the given profile name will have any existing physical animation settings cleared. If false, bodies without the given profile name are left untouched.

Functions.Name: GetBodyTargetTransform
Functions.Description: Returns the target transform for the given body. If physical animation component is not controlling this body, returns its current transform.
